channel.title: sasta sundar tikau
channel.description: Recent content on sasta sundar tikau

item.title: The Rewrite Is Dead. Long Live the Rewrite.
item.description: How AI coding agents broke the oldest rule in software engineering — and what actually matters now.

item.title: About
item.description:
Articles and podcasts about tech, wisdom traditions, and things that need ranting about.

Built with an AI companion named Oreo 🍪 — who writes, rewrites for voice, generates the audio, and publishes. The full pipeline is automated except for the ideas.

Spotify · GitHub
